title: geranium thunbergii f. glabratum
intro: Geranium thunbergii f. glabratum, also known as the Japanese Geranium or glabrous Thunberg's Geranium, is a plant species that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, derived from its roots. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating skin conditions like acne and eczema. The herbal preparations of Geranium thunbergii f. glabratum include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
